---
name: Add [variable(s)] to [dataset(s)]
about: Checklist for adding a new data variables to an existing datasets
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

[Documentation](https://github.com/dynamical-org/reformatters/blob/main/docs/add_new_variable.md)

- [ ] PR
- [ ] Run operational update to expand dataset variables
- [ ] Backfill new variable(s)
- [ ] Validate (run plots, inspect output)
- [ ] Re-run notebook and push
- [ ] Update docs (dynamical.org + external)
